showroomPage.heroSubtitle: See kitchen and bathroom materials in person — cabinets, countertops, tile, and flooring samples. Free consultations at our Richmond BC showroom.
showroomPage.ctaDescription: Book a free consultation at our showroom. Our design team will help you explore options and plan your renovation.
showroomPage.faq1q: Do I need an appointment to visit the showroom?
showroomPage.faq1a: Walk-ins are welcome, but we recommend booking an appointment so our design team can dedicate time to discuss your project in detail.
showroomPage.faq2q: What can I see at the Reno Stars showroom?
showroomPage.faq2a: Our showroom features material samples, cabinet displays, countertop options, tile selections, and design inspiration for kitchen, bathroom, and whole house renovations.
showroomPage.faq3q: Is there parking available at the showroom?
showroomPage.faq3a: Yes, free parking is available directly in front of our showroom location in Richmond.
showroomPage.faq4q: Can I bring my renovation plans to the showroom?
showroomPage.faq4a: Absolutely! Bring your floor plans, photos, or inspiration images. Our team can review them and provide professional recommendations during your visit.
showroomPage.faq5q: What renovation materials are on display at the showroom?
showroomPage.faq5a: The showroom displays kitchen cabinet samples in shaker, slab, and raised-panel styles; countertop slabs in quartz and laminate; and floor and wall tile in a range of formats and finishes. Comparing finishes side by side in person is far more useful than selecting from a catalogue or screen.
showroomPage.faq6q: How far in advance should I book a showroom appointment?
showroomPage.faq6a: For most consultations, 3–7 days' notice is ideal. If your project start date is within the next 2–4 weeks, call us directly at 778-960-7999 and we will do our best to accommodate a same-week visit.
showroomPage.faq7a: Yes. Showroom consultations are completely free with no obligation. Our team will review your project, discuss material options, and provide a rough budget overview at no cost. Detailed written quotes are also free.
showroomPage.faq8q: Can I discuss multiple rooms in one showroom visit?
showroomPage.faq8a: Absolutely. If you bring floor plans or measurements for multiple rooms, our team can discuss scope and ballpark pricing for your kitchen, bathrooms, and other areas in a single consultation. Multi-room projects often benefit from combined planning.
showroomPage.appointmentPrefix: Welcome to schedule a visit to our Renovation showroom
